title: Steward Cheat Sheet — Massachusetts Labor Rights & Filing Quick Reference
description: Synthesized quick-reference for SEIU Local 509 stewards covering MA public-sector employees (DDS focus): an issue-to-agency decision tree across 12 enforcement agencies, a filing-deadline table (15 days to 3 years) with citations to specific source-file lines, per-agency contacts, cross-cutting steward reminders (Weingarten, Loudermill, Duty of Fair Representation, past practice, dual-filing), an intake checklist, and a phone-tree section. Authority traces to the numbered agency landings and sub-*.md primary scrapes it cites.
geographic_coverage: Massachusetts; federal agencies where dual-jurisdiction applies

source.publisher: SEIU Local 509 / DDS chapter (synthesized from MA & federal agency scrapes)

license: © SEIU Local 509 / DDS chapter; free to redistribute with attribution (per folder README)
notes: Synthesized reference compilation — not legal advice; authority traces to the cited primary agency scrapes (01-*.md..11-*.md and sub-*.md). Verify deadlines against current agency sites before acting.
